title: AssemblyAI API keys should not be disclosed
description: AssemblyAI is an AI speech recognition and audio intelligence platform used for transcription, sentiment analysis, speaker detection, and audio summarization. API keys authenticate all API requests. Exposing keys enables unauthorized transcription at your expense and access to previously transcribed audio data.
recommendation: Remove AssemblyAI API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.assemblyai.com/account.
impact: Unauthorized audio transcription at your expense, access to previously transcribed audio data and summaries, and potential exposure of confidential audio content.

checks.message: AssemblyAI API key detected in variable assignment. AssemblyAI API keys authenticate speech-to-text and audio intelligence requests. Exposing this key enables unauthorized transcription billed to your account, access to previously transcribed audio content and summaries (which may contain confidential conversations), sentiment and entity analysis on private audio, and speaker diarization data. Rotate immediately at app.assemblyai.com/account.

AssemblyAI API key detected near AssemblyAI context. A 32-character hex string near AssemblyAI references likely represents an API key for speech transcription services. Verify and rotate if confirmed as a hardcoded credential.
